## How You're Using AgentFlow

**Which AgentFlow features are you using?**
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Multi-agent orchestration (Planner / Executor / Validator)
- [ ] MuleSoft Anypoint connector
- [ ] Dynamic Router (multi-dimensional scoring)
- [ ] Circuit Breaker / Retry policies
- [ ] Natural language intent parsing
- [ ] DAG-based execution plans
- [ ] Custom agents (BaseAgent subclass)

**Which APIs / platforms are you integrating?**
<!-- e.g., Salesforce + Stripe + custom REST APIs -->

**Describe your use case:**
<!-- What problem did you solve with AgentFlow? What did you replace? -->

---

## Impact

**What was the biggest benefit?**
<!-- e.g., Eliminated 400 lines of retry boilerplate, reduced integration failures by 80%, etc. -->

**Anything you'd like to see improved?**

## May We Feature You?

- [ ] Yes, you can mention our company/project name in the README as an adopter
- [ ] Yes, I'm open to a case study / blog post collaboration
- [ ] Please keep this anonymous

*Thank you for sharing! Adoption stories directly help the framework grow and get recognized in the community.*
